tasks.label: GameLift: Initial Setup
tasks.detail: Install dependencies and build GameLift GDExtension (first-time setup, both debug+release)

tasks.label: GameLift: Install WSL Dependencies
args: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y cmake make gcc g++ python3 libssl-dev && pip3 install --user scons
tasks.detail: Install build tools in WSL (cmake, make, gcc, scons)

tasks.label: GameLift: Build GDExtension (Release)
tasks.detail: Build GameLift GDExtension (release, Linux) using build.sh

tasks.label: GameLift: Build GDExtension (Debug)
tasks.detail: Build GameLift GDExtension (debug, Linux) using build.sh

tasks.label: GameLift: Build GDExtension (Both)
tasks.detail: Build GameLift GDExtension (debug + release, Linux) using build.sh

tasks.label: GameLift: Build All Platforms (Release)
tasks.detail: Build GDExtension for Linux, Windows, and macOS (release only)

tasks.label: GameLift: Build All Platforms (Both)
tasks.detail: Build GDExtension for Linux, Windows, and macOS (debug + release)

tasks.label: GameLift: Clean Build
args: cd /mnt/c/Users/lsl/Repositories/hopnbop/gamelift-gdextension && rm -rf bin/ godot-cpp/bin/ .scons_cache/ .sconsign.dblite && echo 'Build artifacts cleaned'
tasks.detail: Clean all build artifacts

tasks.label: GameLift: Full Rebuild (with dependencies)
args: cd /mnt/c/Users/lsl/Repositories/hopnbop/gamelift-gdextension && rm -rf cmake-build godot-cpp gamelift-server-sdk bin .scons_cache .sconsign.dblite && cd /mnt/c/Users/lsl/Repositories/hopnbop && ./gamelift-gdextension/build.sh --both
tasks.detail: Clean everything and rebuild from scratch (includes downloading dependencies)

tasks.label: Godot: Run Server (Preview Mode)
tasks.detail: Run game server in local preview mode (no GameLift)

tasks.label: Godot: Run 3 Instances (Multi-Client Test)
tasks.detail: Launch Godot editor for multi-instance testing (configure Debug > Customize Run Instances)

tasks.label: GameLift: Run Server (Anywhere Mode)
tasks.detail: Run game server with GameLift Anywhere fleet (requires fleet setup)

tasks.label: Tests: Run All Tests
tasks.detail: Run all GUT tests (unit + integration)

tasks.label: Tests: Run Unit Tests
tasks.detail: Run unit tests only

tasks.label: Tests: Run Integration Tests
tasks.detail: Run integration tests only

tasks.label: Tests: Run Specific Test File
tasks.detail: Run a specific test file (prompts for path)

tasks.label: Tests: Run with JUnit XML Output
tasks.detail: Run all tests and export JUnit XML results

tasks.label: GameLift: Package for Deployment
args: cd /mnt/c/Users/lsl/Repositories/hopnbop && mkdir -p gamelift-deploy/lib gamelift-deploy/addons && echo 'TODO: Export Godot server build first' && cp -r addons/gamelift gamelift-deploy/addons/ && cp gamelift-gdextension/gamelift-server-sdk/cmake-build/prefix/lib/libaws-cpp-sdk-gamelift-server.so gamelift-deploy/lib/ && echo '#!/bin/bash' > gamelift-deploy/run_server.sh && echo 'export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$(pwd)/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH"' >> gamelift-deploy/run_server.sh && echo './hopnbop_server --headless -- --server' >> gamelift-deploy/run_server.sh && chmod +x gamelift-deploy/run_server.sh && tar -czf gamelift-deploy.tar.gz gamelift-deploy/ && echo 'Deployment package created: gamelift-deploy.tar.gz'
tasks.detail: Create deployment package for GameLift (requires exported server build)

tasks.label: GameLift: Upload Build to AWS
tasks.detail: Upload deployment package to GameLift (requires AWS CLI configured)

tasks.label: GameLift: Export Linux Server
tasks.detail: Export dedicated Linux server build for GameLift deployment

tasks.label: GameLift: Package Build
args:
cd /mnt/c/Users/lsl/Repositories/hopnbop && rm -rf gamelift-deploy && mkdir -p gamelift-deploy/lib gamelift-deploy/addons && cp -r build/linux/* gamelift-deploy/ && cp -r addons/gamelift gamelift-deploy/addons/ && cp gamelift-gdextension/gamelift-server-sdk/cmake-build/prefix/lib/libaws-cpp-sdk-gamelift-server.so gamelift-deploy/lib/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Warning: GameLift SDK lib not found, build GDExtension first' && cat > gamelift-deploy/run_server.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$(pwd)/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH"
./hopnbop_server.x86_64 --headless -- --server
EOF
 && chmod +x gamelift-deploy/run_server.sh && echo 'Package created in gamelift-deploy/'
tasks.detail: Package exported server with GameLift SDK for deployment

tasks.label: GameLift: Upload Build
args: cd /mnt/c/Users/lsl/Repositories/hopnbop && aws gamelift upload-build --name "hopnbop-${BUILD_VERSION:-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)}" --build-version "${BUILD_VERSION:-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)}" --build-root gamelift-deploy --operating-system AMAZON_LINUX_2023 --region ${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}
tasks.detail: Upload packaged build to AWS GameLift

tasks.label: GameLift: Create Fleet (Interactive)
args: echo 'Creating GameLift Fleet...' && echo '' && echo 'Note: Check AWS Console for the latest build ID from the upload.' && echo '' && echo 'Sample command:' && echo 'aws gamelift create-fleet \' && echo '  --name "hopnbop-dev-fleet" \' && echo '  --description "Development fleet for Hop n Bop" \' && echo '  --build-id "build-xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx" \' && echo '  --ec2-instance-type c5.large \' && echo '  --fleet-type ON_DEMAND \' && echo '  --runtime-configuration "ServerProcesses=[{LaunchPath=/local/game/run_server.sh,ConcurrentExecutions=1}]" \' && echo '  --ec2-inbound-permissions "FromPort=7777,ToPort=7777,IpRange=0.0.0.0/0,Protocol=UDP" \' && echo '  --region us-east-1' && echo '' && echo 'Or use AWS Console: https://console.aws.amazon.com/gamelift/'
tasks.detail: Instructions and example for creating a GameLift fleet

tasks.label: GameLift: Setup Anywhere Fleet
args: echo '=== GameLift Anywhere Fleet Setup ===' && echo '' && echo '1. Create Anywhere fleet (if not exists):' && echo '   aws gamelift create-fleet --name "hopnbop-anywhere" --compute-type ANYWHERE --locations "Location=custom-location-1"' && echo '' && echo '2. Register compute:' && echo '   aws gamelift register-compute --fleet-id fleet-xxxxx --compute-name my-local-pc --ip-address 127.0.0.1 --location custom-location-1' && echo '' && echo '3. Get auth token:' && echo '   aws gamelift get-compute-auth-token --fleet-id fleet-xxxxx --compute-name my-local-pc' && echo '' && echo '4. Set environment variables and run server' && echo '' && echo 'See: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/gamelift/latest/developerguide/fleets-creating-anywhere.html'
tasks.detail: Instructions for setting up GameLift Anywhere fleet for local development

tasks.label: Dev: Format GDScript
tasks.detail: Format all GDScript files using gdscript_formatter addon

tasks.label: Dev: Open Godot Editor
tasks.detail: Open Godot editor

tasks.label: Dev: Check for Pre-existing Errors
tasks.detail: Check for GDScript parse errors without running
